message:
test(core): property-based tests for storage health/stats/search types (35 tests)

Covers DbCheckStatus serde+Display, DbCheckItem, DbCheckReport with
has_errors/has_warnings/problem_count aggregate invariants, DbRepairItem,
DbRepairReport all_succeeded(), TableStats, PaneStats, EventTypeStats,
DbStatsReport serde, SearchLintSeverity, SearchLint skip_serializing_if,
SearchSuggestion, ApprovalTokenRecord is_active() (unused+unexpired,
used, expired), PaneReservation is_active() (active/released/expired/
status) with boundary tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
